hero_subtitle: SFTY helps compliance teams securely record transaction decisions with risk context and preserve audit-ready evidence across provider outputs and regulatory rules.
trust_card_1_value: Identity checks connected to onboarding decisions
trust_card_2_value: Corporate verification, UBO review and entity risk
trust_card_3_value: Wallet and transaction monitoring in one workflow
trust_card_4_value: Message routing, completeness checks and exception handling
trust_card_5_value: Regulatory changes mapped to internal rule
trust_card_6_value: Decision logs and evidence for every review
problem_title: Transaction decisions remain difficult to trace
problem_description: Compliance teams struggle to maintain clear, auditable records of transaction reviews and decisions across multiple provider outputs. This fragmentation slows workflows, weakens risk context, and hampers evidence collection needed for effective case management and regulatory review.
problem_point_1_value: KYC, KYB, KYT and Travel Rule outputs sit in separate tools
problem_point_2_value: Teams move data between dashboards, spreadsheets and internal notes
problem_point_3_value: Regulatory changes are hard to map into internal workflows
problem_point_4_value: Evidence and decision history are difficult to reconstruct later
solution_description: SFTY consolidates provider outputs, risk signals, decision logs and review actions into one workflow so compliance teams can maintain clear, auditable records for transaction case management and regulatory review.
workflow_title: From provider checks to decision logs
workflow_description: SFTY channels compliance checks through rules, case workflows and reviews to record clear transaction decisions supported by audit-ready evidence and reporting.
workflow_step_1_description: KYC, KYB, KYT and screening outputs enter SFTY
workflow_step_2_description: Risk rules route checks into the right workflow
workflow_step_3_description: A case opens with customer, wallet and provider context
workflow_step_4_description: Teams review, decide and record the outcome
workflow_step_5_description: Logs, decisions and reports stay ready for audit
why_sfty_title: Beyond fragmented decisions. One evidence-ready layer
why_sfty_description: SFTY connects transaction decisions with risk context, provider outputs, and audit evidence, enabling VASPs to maintain a clear, traceable compliance workflow beyond isolated tools.
why_sfty_card_1_description: Work above existing KYC, KYB, KYT and Travel Rule tools
why_sfty_card_2_description: Turn disconnected outputs into structured reviews and cases
why_sfty_card_3_description: Preserve evidence, reviewer actions and decision history
why_sfty_card_4_description: Give compliance, risk and leadership one operating view
authority_description: SFTY gives VASPs a controlled compliance layer to log decisions with risk context, preserving evidence for audit, bank due diligence and enterprise governance.
authority_card_1_description: Connect KYC, KYB, KYT, Travel Rule and screening providers into one workflow
authority_card_2_description: Preserve provider outputs, reviewer notes, decisions and supporting records
authority_card_3_description: Prepare clearer compliance evidence for banks, partners and external review
authority_card_4_description: Support private environments, permissions, integrations and internal governance
ask_sfty_placeholder: How can SFTY support transaction decision logs for VASPs
ask_sfty_chip_1_message: Explain how transaction decisions are logged with risk context
ask_sfty_chip_2_message: Show how audit-ready evidence is preserved during case reviews
ask_sfty_chip_3_message: Describe how provider outputs connect to workflow automation
ask_sfty_helper_text: AI assistant for product, deployment and compliance questions
faq_description: Clear answers on provider orchestration, Travel Rule workflows, audit evidence and enterprise compliance operations.
faq_1_question: What is SFTY for VASP compliance teams?
faq_1_answer: SFTY serves VASP compliance teams by connecting provider outputs into structured workflows that connect onboarding, risk review, case management, decision logs, and reporting across digital asset compliance operations.
faq_2_question: How does SFTY log transaction decisions?
faq_2_answer: SFTY captures transaction decisions by applying internal rules, recording risk context, routing cases, and logging each compliance action to build a traceable, auditable decision history.
faq_3_question: How does SFTY preserve audit-ready evidence?
faq_3_answer: SFTY preserves audit-ready evidence by maintaining decision logs, case histories, regulatory rule updates, and supporting documentation, enabling comprehensive review and inspection readiness.
faq_4_question: Can SFTY integrate with existing provider stacks?
faq_4_answer: Yes. SFTY works above existing KYC, KYB, KYT, Travel Rule and screening providers to aggregate outputs without replacing systems, supporting controlled integration and workflow automation.
faq_5_question: Does SFTY replace KYC, KYT or Travel Rule providers?
faq_5_answer: No. SFTY does not replace KYC, KYT, or Travel Rule providers but connects their outputs into operational workflows, decisions, evidence packages and reports for easier compliance management.
final_title: Turn transaction decisions into audit-ready cases
final_description: Review how SFTY connects transaction decision logs, risk context and provider outputs into structured compliance workflows.
footer_description: Supervisory and compliance control layer for digital asset markets, businesses and regulated institutions.

footer_legal_notice: This page is for informational purposes only and does not constitute legal, regulatory or compliance advice. SFTY deployment depends on jurisdiction, client requirements and applicable laws.
